title: CodeMirror editor history management hook
purpose: Manages undo/redo functionality for a CodeMirror editor by tracking history state and providing undo/redo operations.
module_context: Exports a hook function that manages editor history state and provides methods to interact with the editor's undo/redo stack.

steps.content: Initialize a ref to hold the editor view instance.
Initialize state variables to track whether undo and redo operations are available.
Define a callback to update the undo/redo state based on the current editor state.
Define a callback to set the editor view and configure history tracking.
Define a callback to perform an undo operation if available.
Define a callback to perform a redo operation if available.
Return the editor ref, setter, undo function, redo function, and history state flags.
Compute the undo depth of the current editor state.
IF the undo depth is greater than zero, set the undo state to true.
ELSE set the undo state to false.
Compute the redo depth of the current editor state.
IF the redo depth is greater than zero, set the redo state to true.
ELSE set the redo state to false.
Store the new editor view in the ref.
IF the editor view is null, clear the undo and redo state flags.
ELSE set up an update listener to track document changes.
IF document changes or transactions occur, update the history state.
Add the update listener to the editor configuration.
Set the initial history state based on the current editor state.
IF an editor exists and undo is available, perform the undo operation.
IF the undo operation fails, silently ignore the error.
IF an editor exists and redo is available, perform the redo operation.
IF the redo operation fails, silently ignore the error.
